use rayon::ThreadPoolBuilder;

// BAD: library code setting global Rayon thread pool
pub fn init_library() {
    ThreadPoolBuilder::new()
        .num_threads(8)
        .build_global()
        .unwrap();
}

pub fn process_data(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u8> {
    init_library();
    data.par_iter().map(|b| b.wrapping_add(1)).collect()
}
